subject: Virtual background does not appear
description: User selects virtual background; video shows only blur or original room.

ts_steps.title: Requirements
ts_steps.action: Confirm machine meets Zoom virtual background requirements; green screen option if CPU weak.

ts_steps.title: Permissions
ts_steps.action: macOS Camera access for Zoom granted; no other app using camera exclusively.

ts_steps.title: Replace image
ts_steps.action: Use provided Zoom backgrounds first; custom image under 2MB and correct format (PNG/JPG).

internal_information: Apple Silicon vs Intel feature parity changes over time. Corporate policy may disable virtual backgrounds.
